film.title: Goynar Baksho
film.overview: Shirshendu Mukhopadhyay's famous tale of 3 generations of women & their changing position in society,seen in relation to a box of jewels, handed down from one generation to the next. A film by Aparna Sen.

dialogues.dialogue: Ruby studded bangles - cancelled ! Just look at that ! Got him tiedto her apron strings already ! Shameless hussy ! Saw that ? Measly gold chain for me & Burmese rubies for her !

If you are, your child will die too ! Don't you dare sleep with your husband ! Sleep separately. Got that, shameless hussy ?. No salt in the mutton. Sat it ! Saltit ! - Call this cooking ? - What's wrong ?
dialogues.cause_raw: accused of being promiscuous and poor cooking skills

dialogues.dialogue: Before eyeing the house...... you'd better save your rook ! Trying to scare me off ! What a shame ! Everything's going...everything ! Shame !
Trying to scare me off ! What a shame ! Everything's going...everything ! Shame ! Shame on me ! Couldn't save a thing ! Shame ! Oh my goodness !
dialogues.cause_raw: inability to protect or save something

dialogues.dialogue: What a shame ! Everything's going...everything ! Shame ! Shame on me ! Couldn't save a thing ! Shame ! Oh my goodness ! Oh, Lata !
dialogues.cause_raw: inability to protect or save something

dialogues.dialogue: Everything's going...everything ! Shame ! Shame on me ! Couldn't save a thing ! Shame ! Oh my goodness ! Oh, Lata ! Can you do me a favour ?
dialogues.cause_raw: inability to protect or save something

dialogues.dialogue: it's not that easy to run a business ! The shop will wind up soon Your son and his wife......will come back shamefaced There won't be any need forwords ! Pishima !

My brother & his wife were very lucky......fort hey died before......they met agirl like you ! Lowly ! Lowly ! Lowly ! Lowly ! Brazen hussy, bringing shame ! Ruining our familyname ! Now you want to start your game......of doing business ! Shame !
Brazen hussy, bringing shame ! Ruining our familyname ! Now you want to start your game......of doing business ! Shame ! Did you hear my Father's words ? Hmm ?

Why ?. What's that j*****s there for ? Your husband ! Can't bear to part with him for a second, can you ? Shameless hussy ! Always wanting to cuddle ! I've only made threats so far,......but when I really make you a widow......you'll know what's what !

Always wanting to cuddle ! I've only made threats so far,......but when I really make you a widow......you'll know what's what ! Shameless, low-born b***h ! Please Pishima ! Stop cursing & think about expenses !
How can the priceincrease by 100 in 7 days ? I knew there was something fishy ! What a shame ! I was so confident of yourreliability ! You didn't keep my faith !
Just martyred in thewar ! Ghosts ? Shame on you ! Never call theblind blind thelamelame & ghosts ghosts...to their faces ! lthurts their feelings !
dialogues.cause_raw: calling out their disabilities and death

dialogues.dialogue: What were you doing ? Sleeping ? Serves you right ! So proud of your culinary skills ! What happened to you today ?. The mutton was inedible !
